title: Creating NODEs of each type
gherkin:
When the user creates a "<node_type>"
Then the response should contain an ID greater than 11999999
And the response should contain an ID lesser than 99999999

Examples:
  | node_type         |
  | COMPANY           |
  | BRAND             |
  | CAR MODEL         |
  | CAR MODEL VARIANT |
  | RACE TRACK        |
  | TRACK LAYOUT      |
  | RACING SERIES     |
  | RACING EVENT      |
  | RACING SESSION    |
  | SESSION RESULT    |
  | LAP TIME          |
  | RACING GAME       |
  | GAMING PLATFORM   |
  | MAGAZINE          |
  | MAGAZINE ISSUE    |
  | IMAGE             |
